Valley View Park
Construction Documents

Budget: $6,300,000
Timeline: Summer 2026 – Spring 2027
Size: 24 acres
Project Manager: Brian Laczko

A new 24-acre park in Castro Valley, offering natural open space and scenic views, is set to begin construction soon. The community's Master Plan includes a parking lot, a play area for children, a restroom, picnic spots, terraced seating, overlooks, a dog park, a large loop trail, and various trails such as a native plant walk.

Weekes Park:
Weekes Park

HARD Capital Improvement Projects

Basketball & Tennis Court Renovations – Phase 1
Complete

Budget: $2,330,000
Timeline: Fall 2021 – Fall 2023
Size: 17 courts (4 parks)
Project Manager: Darcie DeLashmutt

Renovations to 17 existing sports courts across Alden E. Oliver, Weekes, Bay Trees, and Stonybrook Parks, including basketball, tennis, and pickleball courts, plus a flexible multi-use court for futsal, roller skating, and other activities. Upgrades included new paving, striping, surfacing, site furnishings, drinking fountains, backstops, hoops, nets, and fencing.

Picnic Area Upgrades – Castro Valley & Weekes Parks
Complete

Budget: $1,000,000
Timeline: Winter 2020 – Fall 2021
Size: 6 + 4 group picnic facilities
Project Manager: Darcie DeLashmutt

Renovation of six group picnic facilities at Castro Valley Community Park and four at Weekes Community Park. Upgrades included new paving, signage, trees, waste receptacles, picnic tables, benches, and BBQ grills. Construction completed Fall 2021.

Weekes Community Park Renovation
Planning

Budget: $2,042,000
Timeline: TBD – TBD
Size: 16.6 acres
Project Manager: Meghan Tiernan

The ongoing updates at the 16.6-acre Weekes Community Park were guided by a carefully developed master plan. This plan includes open lawns, restrooms, a convenient concession stand, an playground, bocce courts, a fitness plaza, and a friendly central plaza. It also features attractive group picnic spots, a picturesque pavilion, a shaded shade structure, an energetic bandstand, a scenic walkway, and a tranquil walking loop.
